workloads.name: Apple Metal Node ORT WebGPU provider compare Gemma-3 270M
workloads.description: Repo-only same-stack Node ORT WebGPU compare for Gemma-3 270M on Apple Metal using the same Transformers.js plus onnxruntime-node workload on both sides, with Doe and node-webgpu as the only varying WebGPU providers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict process-wall provider compare on Apple Metal. Both sides use the same Transformers.js plus onnxruntime-node WebGPU stack, the same ONNX model, the same tokenizer-accurate 64-token prompt budget, and the same 64-token decode target on the same Apple Metal host. The only intended execution difference is the WebGPU provider: Doe versus node-webgpu (Dawn-backed package).
